name: openproject-codex
description: Codex plugin for managing OpenProject work through the OpenProject API.

interface.shortDescription: Manage projects, teams, and work in OpenProject from Codex.
interface.longDescription: OpenProject Codex connects Codex directly to the OpenProject API so you can inspect projects, users, groups, memberships, versions, categories, relations, watchers, queries, and work packages; create, update, delete, assign, and comment on work; perform bulk task operations; and manage common project-team workflows without working in the OpenProject UI.
defaultPrompt: List my assigned work in OpenProject.
Assign a team to a project in OpenProject.
Bulk update work packages from Codex.
